title: Goudalicious Smoke Cheesecake
description: A sweet and chewy Saudi Arabian dessert featuring gouda cheese with a hint of smoke, perfect for kids and gluten-free.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8-inch (20 cm) springform pan.
Mix gouda cheese, coconut milk, vanilla extract, and cocoa powder until smooth. Add pitted dates, mix well. Dissolve baking soda in hot water and add it to the mixture.
Fold in coconut flakes gently by hand or using a spatula.
Pour mixture into prepared pan and sprinkle top with extra unsweetened cocoa powder for decoration.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, until edges are golden brown. Let cool completely before unmolding.
